title: genista lanigera
intro: Genista lanigera, also known as woolly broom or broom thistle, is a spiny, evergreen shrub native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which make it useful for treating wounds, digestive issues, and skin conditions. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Genista lanigera can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, from minor cuts and scrapes to more serious health conditions.
